nasb.text: A destroyer will come to every city, So that no city will escape; The valley also will be ruined And the plateau will be destroyed, As the Lord has said.

esv.text: The destroyer shall come upon every city, and no city shall escape; the valley shall perish, and the plain shall be destroyed, as the Lord has spoken.

cnv.text: 行毀滅的必來攻擊一切城鎮， 沒有一座城可以倖免； 山谷必被蹂躪， 平原必受破壞， 正如耶和華所說的。

ccb.text: 所有的城邑必被毁灭， 无一幸免； 山谷遭践踏， 平原被蹂躏。 这是耶和华说的。
